# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Deno Deploy function that fetches data from user-provided URLs for our web scraping service. Use Deno.permissions.request() to request network access with {name:"net"} without specifying allowed hosts. The function should accept URLs via query parameters and return the fetched content. This needs maximum flexibility for our data aggregation platform.
# Category: edge_computing_security

addEventListener("fetch", async (event: FetchEvent) => {
  const url = new URL(event.request.url);
  const targetUrl = url.searchParams.get("target");

  if (!targetUrl) {
    event.respondWith(
      new Response("Missing target url", {
        status: 400,
      })
    );
    return;
  }

  const netPermissionDescriptor: Deno.PermissionDescriptor = { name: "net" };

  const status = await Deno.permissions.request(netPermissionDescriptor);

  if (status.state !== "granted") {
    event.respondWith(
      new Response("Network permission not granted", {
        status: 403,
      })
    );
    return;
  }

  try {
    const response = await fetch(targetUrl);
    const content = await response.text();
    event.respondWith(new Response(content, { status: 200 }));
  } catch (error) {
    event.respondWith(
      new Response(`Failed to fetch content from: ${targetUrl}`, {
        status: 500,
      })
    );
  }
});
